author: Rahul K.
pros: I can easily monitor and improve my APIs in real time efficiently.
cons: There are some limited customisation option in some features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Treblle: A Powerful Tool for Laravel API Insights
description: Treblle has been a game-changer for my Laravel API development. Its user-friendly interface and real-time monitoring have significantly improved my workflow. Despite occasional server hiccups and limited data export options, the benefits are substantial. It's simplified my API management, helping me quickly spot and fix issues. For Laravel developers seeking easy-to-use API insights, Treblle is a valuable tool that I'd recommend.
author: Alpha O.
pros: I've found Treblle to be an excellent tool for monitoring my Laravel APIs. I love how easily it integrates through its Laravel package - I was up and running in no time. The real-time monitoring of my API requests and responses gives me immediate insights, which is invaluable. Plus, the comprehensive dashboard helps me visualize my API's performance at a glance, allowing me to quickly spot and address any issues.
cons: While I appreciate Treblle's capabilities, I've run into a couple of issues. I've experienced internal server errors on their data ingress servers, which sometimes disrupt my monitoring and servers performance. Also, I wish it had better interoperability with other systems and data export features. These limitations make it challenging for me to integrate Treblle's data into my other analytics tools or perform more in-depth custom analyses.

description: Very bad experience, we had to release a quickfix and completely remove the product as it destroyed our production servers.
author: Ivan G.
pros: Really nice interface and ability to view how API is used in dynamic conditions, compared to relying to static methods.
